description: Denfruit vegetable fillings, produced by NPO Green Lines, meet high international quality standards and are based on dried or pickled vegetables, dried fruits, savory herbs, and spices. Denfruit vegetable fillings are used in the production of dairy and fermented milk products (yogurt, kefir, milkshakes, curd products) and create a rich taste and aroma of the introduced vegetable filling. They can be used to create new products with new tastes and aromas to expand the assortment of manufactured products. Denfruit fillings withstand heat treatment up to 100 °C and are introduced into the product by mixing before packaging or by placing them at the bottom of the package as a 'layer' during packaging. The very bright, well-expressed flavor and aroma profile of Denfruit vegetable fillings allows masking foreign aftertastes that appear during product storage. The taste and aroma of the finished product with Denfruit vegetable filling are preserved throughout the technological process, during mechanical processing, and throughout the entire shelf life. **Application areas:** Fermented milk drinks, milkshakes, processed cheeses, and curd products.
